question: What is the full list of hook events a charm can observe? List them all.

claude_output.result:
Here is the full list of **Juju hook events** a charm can observe (via the `ops` framework):

## Lifecycle Hooks
| Hook | Event in `ops` | When it fires |
|---|---|---|
| `install` | `InstallEvent` | Once, when the unit is first deployed |
| `config-changed` | `ConfigChangedEvent` | When charm config changes (also after install, upgrade) |
| `start` | `StartEvent` | After install + config-changed, to start the workload |
| `stop` | `StopEvent` | Before the unit is destroyed |
| `remove` | `RemoveEvent` | When the unit is being removed |
| `upgrade-charm` | `UpgradeCharmEvent` | When a new charm revision is deployed |
| `leader-elected` | `LeaderElectedEvent` | When this unit becomes the leader |
| `leader-settings-changed` | `LeaderSettingsChangedEvent` | When leader settings change (deprecated) |
| `update-status` | `UpdateStatusEvent` | Periodically (every ~5 min by default) |
| `collect-unit-status` | `CollectStatusEvent` | Before status is reported (unit scope) |
| `collect-app-status` | `CollectStatusEvent` | Before status is reported (app scope, leader only) |
| `pre-series-upgrade` | `PreSeriesUpgradeEvent` | Before an OS series upgrade |
| `post-series-upgrade` | `PostSeriesUpgradeEvent` | After an OS series upgrade |

## Relation Hooks
| Hook | Event in `ops` | When it fires |
|---|---|---|
| `relation-created` | `RelationCreatedEvent` | When a relation is first established |
| `relation-joined` | `RelationJoinedEvent` | When a new remote unit joins the relation |
| `relation-changed` | `RelationChangedEvent` | When relation data changes |
| `relation-departed` | `RelationDepartedEvent` | When a remote unit leaves the relation |
| `relation-broken` | `RelationBrokenEvent` | When the relation is fully removed |

## Storage Hooks
| Hook | Event in `ops` | When it fires |
|---|---|---|
| `storage-attached` | `StorageAttachedEvent` | When a storage instance is attached |
| `storage-detaching` | `StorageDetachingEvent` | When a storage instance is about to detach |

## Container / Pebble Hooks (Kubernetes sidecar charms)
| Hook | Event in `ops` | When it fires |
|---|---|---|
| `pebble-ready` | `PebbleReadyEvent` | When the Pebble agent in a container is ready |
| `pebble-custom-notice` | `PebbleCustomNoticeEvent` | When a custom Pebble notice is recorded |
| `pebble-check-failed` | `PebbleCheckFailedEvent` | When a Pebble health check fails |
| `pebble-check-recovered` | `PebbleCheckRecoveredEvent` | When a Pebble health check recovers |

## Secret Hooks
| Hook | Event in `ops` | When it fires |
|---|---|---|
| `secret-changed` | `SecretChangedEvent` | When an observed secret gets a new revision |
| `secret-expired` | `SecretExpiredEvent` | When a secret's expiry time is reached (owner only) |
| `secret-rotate` | `SecretRotateEvent` | When a secret's rotation time is reached (owner only) |
| `secret-remove` | `SecretRemoveEvent` | When an old secret revision can be removed (owner only) |

## Action Hooks
| Hook | Event in `ops` | When it fires |
|---|---|---|
| `<action-name>` | `ActionEvent` | When a user runs `juju run <action>` (one per action defined in `actions.yaml`) |

---

**Total: 28 distinct hook types** (plus one per action you define). The relation, storage, and container hooks are parameterized by the endpoint/storage/container name defined in your `metadata.yaml` (or `charmcraft.yaml`).
